meaning: n.缠绕者,缠绕机,歪曲事实的人,不老实的人,难事,难题
examples: Tuscaloosa Mayor Maddox told CNN that the twister literally obliterated blocks and blocks of the city.
This twister stayed in the open country, away from people or buildings, rotating at 120 mph but only moving at 5 mph.
We had just finished a game of Twister when the door bell rang.
Some teachers tracked the twister on mobile devices, until Simpson asked them to turn them off.
That twister tracked a path that included Moore, a southern suburb of more than 50, 000 people.
